plugins.name: nixos-managing
plugins.description: NixOS management skill — rebuild, configure, deploy, install, build images, monitor. Covers flakes, modules, secret management, VM management, disk imaging, remote deployment, impermanence, LUKS remote-unlock and Telegram/webhook alerting.
